attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
ST.FID                           
,ST.OPERATING_UNIT                
,ST.INSTANCE_NAME                 
,ST.CURRENCY                      
,ST.ORG_ID                        
,ST.LEDGER_ID                     
,ST.APPLICATION_NAME              
,ST.SOURCE                        
,ST.KAFKA_TOPIC_NAME              
,ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID          
,ST.ORDER_LINE_ID                 
,ST.TRX_CLASS                     
,ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID               
,ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
,ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID            
,ST.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID           
,ST.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID           
,CAST(ST.SOLD_TO_SITE_USE_ID AS INTEGER) AS SOLD_TO_SITE_USE_ID
,ST.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT        
,ST.TRX_CURR_CODE                 
,ST.TRX_DATE                      
,ST.ORDER_NUMBER                  
,ST.QUANTITY                      
,ST.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             
,TRIM(CAST(ST.TRX_NUMBER AS VARCHAR(255))) AS TRX_NUMBER
,ST.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE            
,ST.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE           
,ST.QUANTITY_CREDITED             
,ST.REASON_CODE                   
,ST.OA_ATTRIB_ID                  
,ST.ITEM_NAME                     
,ST.OA_PERCENTAGE                 
,ST.SUB_SKU_AMOUNT                
,ST.OA_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       
,ST.OA_QUANTITY                   
,ST.OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID          
,CAST(ST.ROLATTRIBUTE2 AS BIGINT) AS ROLATTRIBUTE2
,ST.RECORD_OFFSET                                 
,CAST(CAST(ST.EDW_CREATE_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,CAST(CAST(ST.EDW_CREATE_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER  
FROM (
SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_SI_CG1_MERK_OA_SUB_SKUS 
WHERE EDW_CREATE_DTM > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES  
WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_EL_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_MERK_OA' AND TABLE_NAME='ST_SI_CG1_MERK_OA_SUB_SKUS')
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,OA_ATTRIB_ID ORDER BY EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC)=1) ST
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_MERK_OA EL
WHERE ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=EL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
AND ST.OA_ATTRIB_ID=EL.OA_ATTRIB_ID)
